nodes.name: 湿地排水
nodes.summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 杰氏鹛雀
nodes.summary: 杰氏鹛雀（Jerdon's babbler，学名 Chrysomma altirostre），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、湿地排水。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Jerdon's babbler lives all-year-round near river courses, where it inhabits dense reedbeds and tall grasslands consisting of cogongrass (Imperata cylindrica), common reed (Phragmites) and reedmace (Typha) species. In Pakistan, it occurs along the Indus and its tributaries.{{cite journal |author=Showler, D

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The reasons are not fully understood, but the population reduction is probably related to habitat destruction by drainage and damming of wetlands for agriculture and flood control, and these threats are not expected to cease anytime soon

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The reasons are not fully understood, but the population reduction is probably related to habitat destruction by drainage and damming of wetlands for agriculture and flood control, and these threats are not expected to cease anytime soon
